fields.name: failedCharacters
fields.description: Names of characters whose createCharPerson() failed during extraction — a 200 response never silently implies 0 failures.

fields.name: failedApparel
fields.description: Names of characters whose best-effort apparel-wizard step failed during createCharPerson() — the character itself was still created; only apparel is missing.

fields.name: failedStatistics
fields.description: Names of characters whose best-effort statistics-estimation step failed during createCharPerson() — the character itself was still created with default statistics.

fields.name: sdConfig
fields.description: Last-used image generation settings for this book, auto-captured on every generateSceneImage call so images can be recreated with the same settings later.
